fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm.
fields.reason: 证据b0035描述了感应熔炼、铸入铜模、晶粒尺寸等工艺细节

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition.
fields.reason: 字段只写As-cast condition，证据还包括晶粒尺寸~0.25 mm等细节，表述不完整

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm.
fields.reason: 证据b0035描述了感应熔炼、铸入铜模、晶粒尺寸等工艺细节

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm, high degree of B2 order and good degree of DO3 order.
fields.reason: 证据b0035支持高B2有序和良好DO3有序的描述

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm, high degree of B2 order and weak DO3 order.
fields.reason: 证据b0035指出25-30%Al合金具有良好DO3有序，字段写弱DO3有序，存在矛盾

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition.
fields.reason: 字段只写As-cast condition，证据还包括晶粒尺寸和有序信息，表述不完整

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm, high degree of B2 order.
fields.reason: 字段未提及DO3有序，而证据表明25-30%Al合金有良好DO3有序，不完整

fields.value: Induction melting under inert gas, drop casting into 25 mm diameter cylindrical copper mould, slow cooling. As-cast condition with coarse grain size ~0.25 mm, high degree of B2 order.
fields.reason: 证据b0035支持高B2有序描述

fields.value: Work hardening rate peaks in the range 26–29 at.% Al, maximum at ~28% Al.
fields.reason: 证据明确说明加工硬化率峰值在26-29%Al范围，最大约28%Al

fields.value: The high work hardening is explained by the combination of superdislocation dipole hardening and the predominance of straight screw dislocations due to strong Peierls (core) effects.
fields.reason: 证据指出高加工硬化归因于超位错偶极硬化和直螺位错主导，后者源于强Peierls力

fields.value: Elastic anisotropy peaks near Fe–25–30% Al, but the authors argue that Peierls forces, not anisotropy itself, are responsible for the screw dislocation alignment and high work hardening.
fields.reason: 证据显示弹性各向异性在25-30%Al出现峰值，但认为Peierls力而非各向异性本身导致硬化

fields.value: Addition of 0.1% B caused a slight increase in flow stress but no consistent change in work hardening rate.
fields.reason: 证据表明0.1%B添加使流变应力略有增加，但加工硬化率无明显变化

fields.value: A small ductility peak at ~28% Al is attributed to the high work hardening rate meeting the Considère criterion.
fields.reason: 证据将~28%Al处的微小延性峰归因于高加工硬化率满足Considère准则

fields.value: Fig. 3 APB energy data from Ray–Crawford–Cockayne: APBI in DO3 order decreases from 78 to 65 mJ/m² over 25.5–28% Al, APBII 78–65 mJ/m² over 26–29% Al, APBI in B2 increases from 65 to 110 mJ/m² over 31–36% Al.
fields.reason: 证据表格数据完全匹配APB能量变化描述

fields.value: Fig. 4 elastic stiffness data show C44 increase and (C11-C12)/2 decrease near 25–30% Al, leading to high Zener anisotropy factor A.
fields.reason: 证据描述C44增加、(C11-C12)/2减小导致高Zener各向异性因子

fields.value: Dislocation reactions forming sessile <100> edge dislocations were observed in Fe–28% Al and Fe–30% Al, contributing to additional hardening.
fields.reason: 证据在Fe-28%Al和Fe-30%Al中观察到形成不可动<100>刃型位错的反应
证据明确提到浇铸入铜模具并缓慢冷却。
